nodes.title: C Programming Foundations (Review)
nodes.rationale: Even with intermediate experience, a quick review of core C concepts ensures a solid base for a complex project like Minishell. This focuses on areas critical for system-level programming.

nodes.title: Advanced Memory Management in C
nodes.rationale: Minishell will involve dynamic allocation and deallocation for commands, arguments, and environment variables. A deep understanding of heap vs. stack and potential pitfalls is crucial.

nodes.title: File I/O and System Calls
nodes.rationale: A shell interacts heavily with the file system for command execution, redirection, and environment variables. Understanding low-level file operations is essential.

nodes.title: Process Management and Execution
nodes.rationale: The core function of a shell is to launch and manage other processes. This module covers the fundamental system calls for process creation, execution, and termination.

nodes.title: Interprocess Communication (IPC)
nodes.rationale: Pipes are a fundamental feature of any shell, allowing communication between different commands. This module focuses on implementing this crucial IPC mechanism.
suggested_micro_topics: File Descriptors and their role in IPC

nodes.title: Signal Handling
nodes.rationale: A robust shell needs to gracefully handle various signals (e.g., Ctrl+C, Ctrl+\). This module covers how to intercept and respond to these system events.

nodes.title: Input Parsing and Lexing
nodes.rationale: Before executing commands, the shell must parse the user's input. This involves breaking the input string into meaningful tokens.

nodes.title: Command Execution Logic
nodes.rationale: This module brings together parsing, process management, and IPC to implement the core command execution loop of the shell.

nodes.title: Readline and History Management
nodes.rationale: For a user-friendly shell, features like command-line editing and history are crucial. The `readline` library provides this functionality.

nodes.title: Project Integration and Testing
nodes.rationale: This final stage involves assembling all the components, thorough testing, and debugging to ensure a functional and robust Minishell.
